summary: Focused on building the Summit crypto trading platform, developing computer vision and input emulation tools, and advancing on-device AI assistants. Also maintained trading automation bots and firmware projects.

items.title: Auth and deployment fixes on Summit platform
items.description: Tweaked authentication pipeline and Docker deployment for the crypto trading SaaS.

items.title: Started new input automation engine Jolt
items.description: Began building a lightweight hotkey tool with interception and scenario support.

items.title: Firmware features for ESP32-S3 HID device
items.description: Added fire-and-forget event emission and an 8×8 matrix variant to the mouse/keyboard firmware.

items.title: Windows input driver library and tests
items.description: Integrated push-style event delivery and wrote integration tests for the KMDF input filter.

items.title: Fixed Explorer file metadata encoding
items.description: Ensured desktop.ini writes in UTF‑16 LE for non‑ASCII tag display in Windows Explorer.

items.title: Android TTS engine expansion and polish
items.description: Added multiple speech engines, pitch control, intonation sliders, and Russian text normalization.

items.title: Major feature rollout on Summit crypto platform
items.description: Built quickstart templates, outbound proxy infrastructure, billing revamp, and completed .NET rewrite deployment.

items.title: Firmware variant development for ESP32-S3
items.description: Drafted a new firmware variant with USB improvements and fixed connection stability.

items.title: Release automation for Windows file tagger
items.description: Polished release pipelines and metadata handling for the Explorer tagging utility.

items.title: Aim assist enhancements with YOLO overlay
items.description: Improved target detection, autofire gating, and debug overlay for the CV-based input tool.

items.title: Dual-core firmware release for ESP32-S3
items.description: Shipped new firmware versions supporting dual-core operation and improved USB connectivity.

items.title: Crypto price model research with MoE architectures
items.description: Ran controlled experiments on mixture-of-experts models and published benchmark results for spike prediction.

items.title: On-device LLM assistant with agent delegation
items.description: Implemented sub-agent delegation, model presets, and background processing for the Android LLM tool.

items.title: Overlay and state persistence for CV tool
items.description: Rewrote the overlay with D3D11/D2D and added mode persistence across restarts.

items.title: Store publishing and CI polish for file tagger
items.description: Automated Microsoft Store submissions, fixed release workflows, and expanded CLI capabilities.

items.title: Code intelligence engine with LSP integration
items.description: Added language-server support, DI detection, and multi-language parsers to the graph-based code analysis tool.

items.title: COM restart fix for HID firmware
items.description: Improved serial connection recovery for the custom input device firmware.

items.title: Computer vision pipeline for online poker
items.description: Built a pipeline for detecting cards, blinds, and actions from poker table video streams.

items.title: Telegram bot for Freqtrade trading
items.description: Developed a multi‑bot Telegram interface with authentication and profit tracking for the Freqtrade platform.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding sessions tool
items.description: Built a multi‑session AI coding assistant with worktree management, squash merging, and git rules.

items.title: Algorithmic trading strategy development
items.description: Iterated on multiple Freqtrade strategies, running hyperopt optimizations and backtesting for crypto markets.

items.title: Initial CV/input emulation experiments
items.description: Started the MEMU3 project with HID mouse emulation, YOLO integration, and aim assistance prototyping.

items.title: Early Freqtrade strategy research
items.description: Developed and backtested trading strategies, exploring hyperopt and leveraged configurations.
